# Portfolio Website Project

## Project Overview
Modern React portfolio website with Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion animations.

## Features
- ✨ Beautiful animations with Framer Motion
- 🎨 Modern UI with Tailwind CSS
- 📱 Fully responsive design
- ⚡ Fast performance with Vite
- 🎯 Smooth scrolling navigation
- 💼 Sections: Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Experience, Contact

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/
│   ├── Navbar.jsx       - Navigation bar with smooth scroll
│   ├── Hero.jsx         - Hero section with animated intro
│   ├── About.jsx        - About me section
│   ├── Skills.jsx       - Skills and technologies
│   ├── Projects.jsx     - Project showcase
│   ├── Experience.jsx   - Work experience timeline
│   ├── Contact.jsx      - Contact form and info
│   └── Footer.jsx       - Footer component
├── App.jsx              - Main app component
└── index.css            - Global styles with Tailwind
```

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server (running at http://localhost:5173/)
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build

## Customization Guide
To personalize this portfolio:
1. Update personal info in all components (name, email, social links)
2. Add your own projects in Projects.jsx
3. Update work experience in Experience.jsx
4. Add your skills in Skills.jsx
5. Customize colors in tailwind.config.js

## Completed Setup Steps
- ✅ Vite + React project scaffolded
- ✅ Tailwind CSS configured with PostCSS
- ✅ Framer Motion installed for animations
- ✅ React Icons added for icons
- ✅ All portfolio components created
- ✅ Responsive navigation with mobile menu
- ✅ Smooth scroll animations
- ✅ Development server running
- ✅ Build tested and verified

## Next Steps
1. Replace placeholder content with your actual information
2. Add real project images and links
3. Update social media links
4. Customize color scheme if desired
5. Deploy to hosting platform (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
